race.description: Tunes At The Track – Sunday 13 Sept Hcp (C1)
race.comment: ENCHANTED MISS (4) has good form and wound up strongly to score last time out over 1650m at Belmont Park. Backmarker who keeps coming and is expected to measure up again. LADY MONEY TALK (3) continues to race well with a maiden win at Pinjarra two back before finishing second here last time. First try at the mile but looks an improver who can measure up. FORGOTTEN SON (1) returned from a break with a fast-finishing win over 1300m here. Has the inside and fitter again for the extra ground. Can go on with it. STOLEN (6) is a former Victorian who ran well first try in this area for the new yard. Fitter and is a second-up winner.
